calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-26-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Angie Diner, CSR 581. Telephone # 415 551 3775. (514)

Petitioners Ruizhi Yu and Joefang Yu; father and mother of minor.
Petitioner Joefang Yu sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Mamie Zhu.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Jiarou Yu to Shelly Jiarou Yu.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
